# MVP Blueprint Template

## Goal
Prove one valuable workflow works.

## Scope
- one workflow
- minimal UI
- minimal connectors
- manual approval allowed
- manual fallback allowed

## Required docs
- pre-dev brief
- process map
- success metrics
- connector matrix
- architecture spec
- prompt list

## Build checklist
- choose one workflow
- define one source of truth
- define one write destination
- define one blocker path
- define one summary report

## Done means
- the workflow works end to end at least once
- outputs are inspectable
- failures are visible
- operator can repeat the flow
